name: opencode-cli-usage-meter
description: Standalone OpenCode TUI plugin that displays CLI usage in the sidebar.

scripts.smoke:pty-native: node --input-type=module -e "const{spawn}=await import('node-pty');const terminal=spawn(process.execPath,['-e','setTimeout(()=>{},30000)'],{cols:80,rows:24,cwd:process.cwd(),env:{PATH:process.env.PATH??''},name:'xterm'});await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{let settled=false;const finish=(error)=>{if(settled)return;settled=true;clearTimeout(killTimer);clearTimeout(watchdog);error?reject(error):resolve()};const killTimer=setTimeout(()=>terminal.kill(),100);const watchdog=setTimeout(()=>finish(new Error('PTY smoke did not terminate')),5000);terminal.onExit(()=>finish());terminal.onData(()=>{})})"
scripts.smoke:consumer: node --input-type=module -e "import{execFileSync}from'node:child_process';import{mkdtemp,rm,writeFile}from'node:fs/promises';import{tmpdir}from'node:os';import{join}from'node:path';const name='opencode-cli-usage-meter',windows=process.platform==='win32',npm=windows?'npm.cmd':'npm',root=await mkdtemp(join(tmpdir(),'usage-meter-consumer-'));try{const[{filename}]=JSON.parse(execFileSync(npm,['pack','--json','--ignore-scripts','--pack-destination',root],{encoding:'utf8',shell:windows}));await writeFile(join(root,'package.json'),JSON.stringify({private:true,type:'module'}));execFileSync(npm,['install','--ignore-scripts',join(root,filename)],{cwd:root,stdio:'inherit',shell:windows});const quoted=JSON.stringify(name),check='for(const specifier of['+quoted+','+JSON.stringify(name+'/tui')+']){const module=await import(specifier);if(module.default?.id!=='+quoted+'||typeof module.default?.tui!==\"function\")throw new Error(\"Invalid plugin export: \"+specifier)}';await writeFile(join(root,'smoke.mjs'),check);execFileSync(process.execPath,['smoke.mjs'],{cwd:root,stdio:'inherit'})}finally{await rm(root,{recursive:true,force:true})}"
